title: Lyophilized metal-antibody reconstitution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a7ojs","text":"This protocol describes the procedure to prepare the reconstitution buffer and the resuspension of metal-labeled antibody.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Number"],["Tris 1M, pH 7.5","Thermofisher","15567027"],["Ultrapure Water","Thermofisher","10977023"],["Sodium azide (100x, 20 mg/mL)","Sigma Aldrich","S2002-25G"],["Antibody stabilizer Tris-based","Boca Scientific","130 050"],["Tube conical super clear, 500µL ","VWR","16466-050"],["Millex-HV (0.45 µm)","Millipore","SLHV033R5"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23],"show_headers":true}}}}
steps: Add 500 µL Tris 1M, pH 7.5 in 50 mL tube
Make aliquots of 10 mL and store a -20 °C
Prepare reconstitution buffer A B C D 1 Reagents For 10 mL For 20 mL For 50 mL 2 Antibody stabilizer (Tris-based) 3.75 7.5 18.75 3 Tris (10 mM, pH 7.5), sodium azide (20mg/mL) 6.25 12.5 31.25
For 10 mL Add 3.75 mL of Antibody stabilizer ( Tris-based )
Add 6.25 mL Tris (10 mM), sodium azide
Filter using Milex-HV (0.45 µm) and syringe in new
Make aliquots of 1 mL and store at -20 °C
Take a 5 µg aliquoted antibody tube and bring at Room temperature
Carefully open the screw cap tube
Add gradually 100 µL of reconstitution buffer over the lyophilized cake without touching it
Mix gently by flicking the bottom of the tube
Let it sit for at least 00:30:00 at room temperature to allow rehydration Highly recommended: store at 4 °C overnight to allow longer time for rehydration
Mix gently by flicking the bottom of the tube, while flicking inspect for translucid pellet and make sure that the lyophilized cake is totally suspended
Place the suspension dot label at bottom of the tube with the date recorded as MM/DD/YY; 50 µg/mL
Store at 4˚C or use an aliquot immediately
creator: Marc Bosse
